info.name: CuraFlow API
info.description:
CuraFlow Backend API

A healthcare caregiver management backend built using Node.js, Express, MongoDB Atlas and JWT authentication.

Development Environment:  
Local

Deployment:  
Render (Future)

exec: pm.test("Avatar URL is a string", function () {

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location '{{ BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients' \
--request POST \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
    "fullname":"Rajesh Verma",
    "dateOfBirth":"1964-09-21",
    "gender":"male",
    "bloodGroup":"B+",
    "contactNumber":"9876543210",
    "emergencyContact":{
        "name":"Anita Verma",
        "phone":"9876543211",
        "relation":"Wife"
    },
    "address":{
        "street":"Civil Lines",
        "city":"Jhansi",
        "state":"Uttar Pradesh",
        "pincode":"284001"
    },
    "allergies":[
        "Dust",
        "Penicillin"
    ],
    "notes":"Recovering from ischemic stroke"
}'

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/prescriptions' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--cookie "accessToken={{accessToken}}" \
--data '{
  "medicineName": "Ecosprin",
  "dosage": "75mg",
  "frequency": "Once daily",
  "route": "Oral",
  "startDate": "2024-01-01",
  "endDate": "2024-06-30",
  "instructions": "Take after food",
  "doctorName": "Dr. Sharma"
}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request PATCH '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/prescriptions/{{prescriptionId}}' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--cookie "accessToken={{accessToken}}" \
--data '{
  "dosage": "150mg",
  "instructions": "Take before food"
}'

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST "{{baseUrl}}/patients/{{patientId}}/logs" \
  --cookie "accessToken={{accessToken}}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "date": "2026-06-26",
    "exerciseDone": true,
    "physiotherapyDone": false,
    "medicinesTaken": true,
    "waterIntake": 2.5,
    "sleepHours": 7,
    "bowelMovement": true,
    "appetite": "Good",
    "mood": "Good",
    "notes": "Patient had a stable day."
  }'

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals' \
--cookie 'accessToken={{accessToken}}' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
  "date":"2026-06-26",
  "bloodPressureSystolic":120,
  "bloodPressureDiastolic":80,
  "heartRate":72,
  "temperature":36.8,
  "oxygenSaturation":98,
  "bloodSugar":110,
  "weight":72.5,
  "notes":"Patient vitals are stable."
}'

exec: pm.test("Weekly vitals is an array", function () {

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location --request GET '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals/analytics' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request GET '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals/analytics?range=week' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request GET '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals/analytics?range=month' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request GET '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals/analytics?range=all' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request GET '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/vitals/analytics?range=6months' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request PATCH '{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/vitals/{{vitalId}}' \
--cookie 'accessToken={{accessToken}}' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
    "heartRate":75,
    "temperature":37,
    "notes":"Vitals improving."
}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST "{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/patients/{{patientId}}/reports" \
--cookie "accessToken={{{{access_token}}}}" \
--form "reportFile=@/absolute/path/report.pdf" \
--form "reportName=MRI Brain" \
--form "category=MRI" \
--form "reportDate=2026-06-26" \
--form "remarks=Follow-up MRI"

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request PATCH "{{BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/reports/{{reportId}}" \
--form "reportName=MRI Brain Updated" \
--form "remarks=Updated remarks"

// don't accidentally keep referencing a now-deleted patientId

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST '{{ BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/users/logout'

Generated from cURL: curl --location '{{ BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/users/register' \
--form 'fullname="John Doe"' \
--form 'username="johndoe"' \
--form 'email="john@example.com"' \
--form 'password="password123"' \
--form 'avatar=@"/FULL/PATH/TO/avatar.jpg"' \
--form 'coverImage=@"/FULL/PATH/TO/cover.jpg"'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request PATCH '{{BASE_URL}}/users/caregivers/{{CAREGIVER_ID}}/suspend' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{{{access_token}}}}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location --request DELETE '{{BASE_URL}}/users/caregivers/{{CAREGIVER_ID}}' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer {{{{access_token}}}}'
Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST '{{ BASE_URL}}{{API_PREFIX}}/users/logout'
